name: HTTYD RPG
description:
Welcome to the Dragon's Realm of Berk!

Step into a world where Vikings and dragons share the land, and every choice you make can change the fate of the island. Live as a fearless Viking, a cunning dragon rider, or even a misunderstood creature of the wild. Embark on daring adventures, forge alliances, and face the unpredictable challenges of life on Berk. Will you rise to legendary status, or will you fall into obscurity? Your journey begins now, and the island's untamed spirit awaits your next move.

[ NSFW & VIOLENCE ALLOWED ]
creator: Delightfulness
